Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Talk Character Entity ID
Fields.Description: Used as a foreign key when referencing from a conversation.

Fields.Name: Defeat Target List Entity ID
Fields.Description: Entity ID of the character / group to be defeated by the buddy when summoned from this stele

Fields.Name: Summoned Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Flag ID that stands when summoned from a stone monument. When this flag is set, the stone monument cannot be summoned.

Fields.Name: Is Special Monument
Fields.Description: Is the stone monument an SP stone monument or a general-purpose stone monument? A bool that distinguishes.

Fields.Name: Buddy ID
Fields.Description: ID of the buddy parameter. If Special is , this buddy ID will be summoned.

Fields.Name: Applied SpEffect ID
Fields.Description: Special effect ID applied to the buddy when summoning the buddy.

Fields.Name: Activation Distance
Fields.Description: If there is at least one character to be defeated in this range, you can summon a buddy at that stone monument.

Fields.Name: Overwrite Return Range
Fields.Description: Buddy's homecoming distance can be overridden

Fields.Name: Overwrite Activation Region Entity ID
Fields.Description: The range where the buddy can be summoned can be overwritten in the area of the specified entity ID.
